dbPath.label: SQLite Database Path
dbPath.help: Path to the unified SQLite database. Created automatically if missing.

ragSlim.label: RAG Injection on Agent Start
ragSlim.help: Inject relevant context from vector search + FTS5 into agent context.

logToolCalls.label: Log Tool Calls
logToolCalls.help: Auto-log state-changing tool calls to memory.

logToolWhitelist.label: Tool Call Whitelist
logToolWhitelist.help: Only log these tool prefixes (e.g. exec, message, gateway). Empty = log all.

ragTopK.label: RAG Top-K Results
ragTopK.help: Number of vector search results to inject on agent start.

memoryBank.extractionApiKey.label: Extraction API Key
memoryBank.extractionApiKey.help: API key for the extraction LLM endpoint (required for Anthropic/OpenAI hosted models, optional for local Ollama).

maintenanceOnStartup.description: Run TTL expiry + confidence decay on startup (default: true)
